package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_temporary_byte_slice_for_string_write: Layer: Memory allocation. Flag []byte(string) conversions used only to write strings to writers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule568NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario568Negative(records []Rule568NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
